answers: Parkour = moving through environment efficiently using running, jumping, climbing, and vaulting. Start with basics on ground level.
Beginner moves: precision jump, safety roll, wall run, vault, and balance. Master each before combining.
Safety first: start low, use soft ground, warm up properly, and progress slowly. Never attempt moves beyond your skill level.
Learn parkour: join a local gym/class, practice basics, build strength (pull-ups, push-ups), and drill landings.
